creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Our GLPI port at www/glpi is still stuck at version 9.2.1, but since September, 12th, GLPI 9.3.1 is available.

Obviously, the version matters for some (at least for us) important plugins, like data injection, which allows for mass data imports.

It would be nice to have an update on our port.

Thanks in advance,

oh
